THE ORDER OF EXAMINATION IS DISCHARGED AS TO DEFENDANT, THE JUDGMENT IS SATISFIED ON THE PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM AND DEFENDANT'S CROSS--COMPLAINT. PLAINTIFF WAS NOT PRESENT. DEFENDANT WAS NOT PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (D-506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF AUG-20-2013 - JUDGMENT.
REFUND/REIMBURSEMENT OF $3,376.16 RE 32061 FOR TRANSACTION W0513923D005 (DEPOSIT OF JUDGMENT), PAYABLE TO GALINA GALANT, DOC #1905731909, WARRANT #38203046, DATED DEC-18-2013

SMALL CLAIMS OEX CALENDAR OF JAN-09-2014 IS CONTINUED FOR PROGRESS REPORT TO APR-10-2014 AT 11:00 AM IN DEPT. 506. BOTH PARTIES APPEARED TODAY. THE PLAINTIFF, GALINA GALANT PAID WITH TWO CHECKS A TOTAL OF $3876.16, ($3,376.16 AND $500.00). THE PARTIES HAVE AGREED TODAY THAT THE PLAINTIFF WILL PAY THE BALANCE OF THE JUDGMENT IN INSTALLMENT PAYMENTS OF $500.00 PER MONTH, STARTING FEBRUARY 1, 2014. THE MATTER IS CONTINUED TO APRIL 10, 2014 AT 11:00 AM FOR A PROGRESS REPORT. IF NO APPEARANCE, CONTINUE MATTER FOR ANOTHER 3 MONTHS FOR PROGRESS REPORT/ORDER OF EXAMINATION DISCHARGE. BENCH LETTER ISSUED FOR GALINA GALANT IS WITHDRAWN. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: S. VANTREE AND M. MANZELLA. NOT REPORTED. (DEPT 506)
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, AS TO CROSS DEFENDANT GALANT, GALINA
